title: Last Card
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Last Card''' was a casino on [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd 5]].

Located in the [[Westrex]] district of [[Efavan/Legends|Efavan]], the Last Card was one of the smaller casinos that lined [[Casino Line]].

{{Loc-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
